heading: Regulations
label: 2654 Regulations
text: The Secretary of Labor shall prescribe such regulations as are necessary to carry out subchapter I and this subchapter not later than 120 days after .February 5, 1993
notes: Effective DateSection effective 6 months after , see , set out as a note under .Feb. 5, 1993section 405(b)(1) of Pub. L. 103–3section 2601 of this title
